summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MICRO Rivera Bus Tracker ghost bus features. Backend MongoDB persistence and API endpoints working perfectly. Frontend UI correctly displays ghost buses with reduced opacity, 'Vistos recientemente' section, and 'Última posición conocida' banners. All core functionality verified including theme toggle, line filters, and map interactions.
passed_tests: Backend /api/buses returns activeCount and lastSeenCount fields correctly
Backend saves bus positions to MongoDB bus_positions collection
Backend returns ghost buses with isLastSeen=true when not in current API
Backend ghost bus functionality verified with test document insertion
Frontend top bar displays 'X activos + Y recientes' format correctly
Frontend bus list shows 'Vistos recientemente' section for ghost buses
Ghost bus markers display with reduced opacity (0.45) on map
Bottom sheet shows 'Última posición conocida' banner for ghost buses
Ghost bus details display with 'Visto' badge and correct information
Theme toggle works correctly with ghost buses present
Line filter functionality works with mixed active/ghost buses
Map controls and navigation remain stable with ghost buses
Bus list panel opens and displays both active and ghost buses correctly
Ghost bus time stamps show 'hace X min' format correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 4 API tests passed including ghost bus functionality
success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All ghost bus UI features working, minor modal overlay interaction timeouts
